app.title: Menap - Imicungire y'Ibiribwa
app.subtitle: Gupanga no gukurikirana ingengo y'imari y'ibiribwa mu rugo

setup.title: Kaze neza kuri Menap
setup.desc: Panga kandi ukurikirane ingengo y'imari y'ibiribwa mu rugo rwawe, menya igihe ibiribwa bishirirako, kandi ubone integuza iyo ibiribwa bishize ingengo y'imari itararangira.

search.placeholder: Rondera ingengo y'imari, ibiribwa, canke ibyo waguze...
search.empty: Nta kintu cabonetse kijanye n'ivyo uriko urarondera.

settings.title: Gutunganya ibirimwo
settings.export_desc: Bika ingengo z'imari, ibiribwa, ivyo waguze, n'amagenamiterere byose muri dosiye ifunze (.dem).
settings.import_desc: Garura amakuru n'amagenamiterere wari wabitse muri dosiye ya (.dem canke .sem).
settings.import_success: Amakuru yagarutse neza! Aplikasiyo irasubira gutangira...
settings.import_error: Ntibyashobotse kugarura amakuru. Reba ko dosiye ari iy'ukuri (.dem canke .sem).

dashboard.title: Ibihagaze
dashboard.no_budgets: Nta ngengo y'imari ifise itariki ihuye n'iyo wahisemo. Kanda hano uyihange!
dashboard.items_exhausted_warning: Iburira: Ibiribwa {count} vyashize ingengo y'imari itararangira!

budget.name: Izina ry'Ingengo y'Imari
budget.delete_confirm: Ese urashaka gusiba iyi ngengo y'imari n'ibiyirimo byose?
budget.no_items: Nta kiribwa kirashyirwa muri iyi ngengo y'imari.

item.name: Izina ry'Ikiribwa
item.no_purchases: Nta kintu kirandikwa cyaguzwe kuri iki kiribwa.
item.advice_desc: Inama: '{name}' vyashize mbere ubushize. Turakugira inama yo guteganya {suggested} ({original} iy'ibanze + {refills} inygegeranyo).

contact.title: Hari ico umenyesha?
contact.author: Umutunganyi
contact.desc: Menap yagenewe gufasha ingo gupanga ingengo z'imari z'ibiribwa, gukurikirana ibikoreshwa, no gucunga neza ibiribwa mu rugo.

logout.title: Gusohoka
logout.desc: Ese urashaka kubika amakuru yawe mbere yo gusohoka? Uzashobora kugaruka ukoresheje dosiye ya QR code cyangwa dosiye ya .dem wari wabitse.
